result_summary: The Chicago Bears' Super Bowl history centers on their iconic 1985 victory and one later appearance in 2006. They are remembered for dominating Super Bowl XX, led by one of the NFL's greatest defenses. The Bears have not won a Super Bowl since, though recent seasons have renewed playoff hopes.

results.title: Chicago Bears - Super Bowl History & Highlights
results.snippet: The Chicago Bears have appeared in two Super Bowls: winning Super Bowl XX (1985 season) and losing Super Bowl XLI (2006 season).
results.summary: The Bears' crowning achievement came in 1985, when a legendary defense led the team to a Super Bowl XX victory. Their sole other appearance was in Super Bowl XLI, where they lost to the Indianapolis Colts. The team holds a storied NFL legacy.

results.title: The '85 Bears at 40: Reliving Chicago's greatest sports season
results.snippet: The 1985 Bears dominated the league en route to a Super Bowl XX win, becoming one of football's most beloved teams.
results.summary: The 1985 Chicago Bears remain one of the NFL's most celebrated teams, known for their colorful personalities, defensive prowess, and championship run culminating in a 46–10 win over the New England Patriots.

results.title: Bears won Super Bowl 32 years ago Friday
results.snippet: The Bears routed the New England Patriots 46-10 in Super Bowl XX, considered one of the most dominant performances in the game's history.
results.summary: Official team site article revisits the Bears' lone Super Bowl championship and the lasting legacy of their 1985 triumph, celebrated annually by the franchise and its fans.
